name: Your Girls
short_description: Cute Dancing Desktop Pet,Simple MMD Player Supports Workshop
detailed_description:
Steam WorkShop supported.

Action files can be imported.

--Model operation--

  • Drag the model with the middle mouse button,

  • Scroll the wheel to zoom the model

  • Right-click to pop up the menu.

-- Functional interface --

  • The tray icon has functions such as changing models and adding models.

  • Workshop can be opened through the system tray icon.

Play Animation

  • Drag the action file onto the model to play it directly. Supports Mixmo's Fbx for Unity (*.fbx) format files.

  • Drag the VMD format action file onto the model to play the action, and drag the MP3 file onto the model to associate music.
